payload.description:
As a downstream maintainer, I want Plexus dependency metadata to constrain compatible versions clearly, so that pip resolves quickly and reproducibly.

Feature: Deterministic Plexus dependency resolution
Scenario: Install Plexus and downstream requirements in fresh Python 3.11 environment
Given a clean Python 3.11 environment with modern pip
When pip resolves Plexus dependencies via pyproject and requirements
Then resolver backtracking remains bounded and does not hit resolution-too-deep
And pinned/compatible constraints avoid known cross-package version conflicts
And downstream consumers can install without pinning large transitive dependency sets
payload.title: Define deterministic install behavior for Plexus dependency graph
